info.name: JOD Dashboard API v1
info.description:
Complete API documentation for JOD Dashboard - Admin, Organization, and User endpoints.

**Base URL**: `http://localhost/api/v1`

**Authentication**: All endpoints require `auth:sanctum` token in `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header

**Response Contract**:
- Collections: `{ data: [], meta: { currentPage, perPage, total, lastPage }, message }`
- Single resource: `{ data: {}, message }`
- Mutations: `{ data: {...}, message }` or `204` for delete

**Query Parameters**:
- Pagination: `page` (default 1), `perPage` (default 20, max 100)
- Filters: `filter.fieldName=value`
- Sort: `sort=field` or `sort=-field` (Spatie style)
- Compatibility: Frontend `sortBy` keys auto-mapped server-side

## Enums Reference
### userType
- `admin` - Administrator with full access
- `organization_staff` - Staff member of an organization
- `organization_admin` - Admin of an organization
- `user` - Regular user/donor

### status
- `active` - Resource is active
- `inactive` - Resource is inactive
- `pending` - Resource is pending approval
- `suspended` - Resource is suspended

### postStatus
- `draft` - Post is in draft
- `published` - Post is published
- `rejected` - Post was rejected
- `archived` - Post is archived

### campaignStatus
- `draft` - Campaign in draft
- `active` - Campaign is actively accepting donations
- `completed` - Campaign has reached its target
- `cancelled` - Campaign was cancelled
- `pending` - Campaign pending approval

### reportStatus
- `open` - Report is open
- `in_review` - Report under review
- `resolved` - Report has been resolved
- `closed` - Report is closed

### priority
- `low` - Low priority
- `medium` - Medium priority
- `high` - High priority
- `critical` - Critical priority


## Enums Reference
### userType
- `admin` - Administrator with full access
- `organization_staff` - Staff member of an organization
- `organization_admin` - Admin of an organization
- `user` - Regular user/donor

### status
- `active` - Resource is active
- `inactive` - Resource is inactive
- `pending` - Resource is pending approval
- `suspended` - Resource is suspended

### postStatus
- `draft` - Post is in draft
- `published` - Post is published
- `rejected` - Post was rejected
- `archived` - Post is archived

### campaignStatus
- `draft` - Campaign in draft
- `active` - Campaign is actively accepting donations
- `completed` - Campaign has reached its target
- `cancelled` - Campaign was cancelled
- `pending` - Campaign pending approval

### reportStatus
- `open` - Report is open
- `in_review` - Report under review
- `resolved` - Report has been resolved
- `closed` - Report is closed

### priority
- `low` - Low priority
- `medium` - Medium priority
- `high` - High priority
- `critical` - Critical priority

item.name: Bootstrap & Profile
item.description: User profile, permissions, and dashboard context initialization

request.description:
Get current authenticated user's profile information for topbar/header.

**Response fields**: `id, name, email, phone, userType, organizationId?, organizationName?, status, createdAt, lastActiveAt`

Get current user's permission set for menu gating and action button visibility.

**Response fields**: `modules[], flat{ permissionName: boolean }, granted[]`

**Use for**: Sidebar visibility, button state, feature flags

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Admin - Overview & Analytics
item.description: Admin dashboard overview, KPIs, analytics, and audit logs

request.description:
Get admin dashboard KPI cards and recent activity feed.

**Response**: `stats[] { id, label, value, subLabel, icon }, activity[] { id, title, detail, at }`

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description:
Get admin dashboard KPI cards and recent activity feed.

**Response**: `stats[] { id, label, value, subLabel, icon }, activity[] { id, title, detail, at }`

request.description:
Get KPI metrics for selected time range.

**Query parameters**: `range` (7d|30d|90d|12m)
**Response fields**: `kpis[] { id, label, value, changeVsLastMonth }`

originalRequest.description:

**Response fields**: `rows[] { weekLabel, visits, newUsers, donations }`

originalRequest.description:

**Response fields**: `rows[] { weekLabel, visits, newUsers, donations }`

request.description:
List audit logs with filters and pagination.

**Query parameters**:
- `page, perPage` (pagination)
- `filter.actorUserId` (user who performed action)
- `filter.action` (action type)
- `filter.from, filter.to` (date range)
- `sort` (at|-at)

**Response fields**: `{ id, action, user, at, entityType?, entityId?, metadata? }`

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description:
List audit logs with filters and pagination.

**Query parameters**:
- `page, perPage` (pagination)
- `filter.actorUserId` (user who performed action)
- `filter.action` (action type)
- `filter.from, filter.to` (date range)
- `sort` (at|-at)

**Response fields**: `{ id, action, user, at, entityType?, entityId?, metadata? }`

request.description:

**Supported sorts**: createdAt|-createdAt|name|-name|lastActiveAt|-lastActiveAt
**Response fields**: `{ id, name, email, phone, role, status, postsCount, reportsCount, createdAt, lastActiveAt }`

**Body fields**: `name, email, phone, role, status` (required), `password?` (optional)
